About Orange 🍊

Orange is a GitHub repository template for building .NET 10 services following Clean Architecture principles. It provides a solid foundation for building scalable, maintainable, and testable applications.

Technology Stack

🔷

.NET 10

Modern, high-performance web framework

🏗️

Clean Architecture

Layered architecture for maintainable code

🔄

CQRS

Command Query Responsibility Segregation

🚀

Astro

Fast static-first web framework

🎨

Tailwind CSS

Utility-first CSS framework

📘

TypeScript

Typed JavaScript for safer code

Architecture Overview

Domain

Core business entities, value objects, and interfaces

Application

Use cases, CQRS commands/queries, and business rules

Infrastructure

Database, external services, and repository implementations

API

Minimal API presentation layer with OpenAPI documentation

API Response Format

JSON 

{
  "data": [...],
  "total": 100,
  "page": 1,
  "pageSize": 10,
  "totalPages": 10
}

Getting Started

Prerequisites

  • ✓ .NET 10 SDK
  • ✓ Node.js 18+
  • ✓ npm 9+

Terminal 

# Run the API service
./run.sh

# Run the client
cd Client
npm install
npm run dev
🍊 Orange Clean Architecture Template

© 2026 Orange. Built with Astro & Tailwind CSS.
